refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, s.Amount FROM [bronze].[CustomerRaw] c JOIN [bronze].[SalesRaw] s ON c.CustomerID = s.CustomerID
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH src_customer AS (SELECT * FROM [bronze].[CustomerRaw]), src_sales AS (SELECT * FROM [bronze].[SalesRaw]), joined AS (SELECT c.CustomerID, s.Amount FROM src_customer c JOIN src_sales s ON c.CustomerID = s.CustomerID), final AS (SELECT CustomerID, Amount FROM joined) SELECT * FROM final

statements.sql: INSERT INTO [silver].[FactSales] (CustomerID, Amount) SELECT c.CustomerID, s.Amount FROM [bronze].[CustomerRaw] c JOIN [bronze].[SalesRaw] s ON c.CustomerID = s.CustomerID;
